# CamScanner - PDF-scanner app · Productivity

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 10:51 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Ads pressure](#theme-ads)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)
- [Sync and accounts](#theme-sync_accounts)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 7, 2026 - Jul 7, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Dean Eau_, Jul 7, 2026, 1/5: "used to be my favorite scanner, but now it is just annoying. After almost every scan there are ads, sometimes several in a row. The X buttons are often hard to see or disappear. One wrong tap sends you to the Play Store and you cannot return properly. Good scan quality, but ads and subscription prompts make it unusable for me."

## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

   **Ads pressure.**
      6 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jun 22, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Yoav Aviran Grad_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "more ads then features"
            2. _R. Fra_, Jul 16, 2026, 1/5: "way too many ads that makes the use of the app a real hassle"
            3. _Ben No_, Jun 22, 2026, 1/5: "questionable ads everywhere. this used to be a good app but every year it got more and more adds. the content of the adds is very dubious to say the least. there are better apps out there that can do more and and add free incl. better privacy."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      6 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 17, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Sarah Burris_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "Yes i still love what i could do with it. but i cancelled the trial period because i lost my job and they continuously keep trying to take $49.99 out of my account every month. THATS CALLED STEALING GUYS!!! STOP TRYING TO STEAL FROM ME. I CANCELLED IN PLENTY OF TIME AND YOU CANT DO THAT TO PEOPLE."
            2. _A Google user_, Jul 17, 2026, 2/5: "I've happily used this for years and paid for premium for a while. The base functionality is still just as good but all the ads are truly horrible and clicking the cross on them usually clicks through so that clearly doesn't work. The price is way too high and subscription based which is kinda ridiculous and I only use it twice a year. I get that they need to make money but this has gone too far now."
            3. _Jed Chan_, Jul 17, 2026, 3/5: "Update: Fr. 5 to 3 stars. I paid the one-time fee and used no other scanner since 2014. But slowly they move basic features like 'reordering pages' to their new premium plan. I now need to pay for something that was free. - I use this to scan and keep important documents which kept my office clutter free! Moreover, it also boosts my productivity by allowing me to sign contracts, scan, and send through email. Very convenient. No complains so far. Excited to see future developments for this app."
